inputs.price_source: Yahoo Finance XYL regular market price 2026-07-09 (mechanical refresh will update)
inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 operating cash flow $1,241M minus capital spending $331M = $910M free cash flow ÷ ~244.1M diluted shares (10-K filed 2026-02-25)
inputs.dividend_source: Q1 2026 declared dividend $0.43 per share; dividends per share paid increased 11% in 2025 (10-K)
inputs.normalization_note: Lawrence base uses FY2025 filed free cash flow ($910M). Adjusted operating income $1,612M (17.8% margin) reflects post-Evoqua integration benefits but is not used as FCF starting point.

bear.notes: Municipal capex slows; Measurement margin stays compressed; multiple reverts toward mid-cycle industrial peers

base.notes: Mid-single-digit revenue growth; adjusted operating margin holds near high-teens; services and smart metering mix support per-share cash; debt paydown continues

bull.notes: Water infrastructure and WSS services accelerate; Measurement analytics mix lifts margin; bolt-on M&A adds revenue without leverage spike

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Manufacturing and service assets on balance sheet at cost; no land/NAV misstatement pattern (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: Water technology equipment and services; no resource royalty

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Corporate operating loss $97M FY2025; Measurement segment operating margin 11.7% vs 13.2% prior year — burden in consolidated path, not separate zero terminal

option_scan.question: Backlog / embedded product option in revenue path?
option_scan.evidence: Remaining performance obligation $1,957M at Q1 2026 (10-Q); smart metering and outsourced water services in growth assumptions

option_scan.question: Private stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: No material private equity stakes requiring SOTP

option_scan.question: Product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Smart meters, analytics software, and WSS service contracts already in segment revenue; growth in base scenario

growth_explanation.mechanism: Post-Evoqua four-segment platform compounds owner cash through utility and industrial water demand, services mix (WSS margin expansion to 12.3% operating / 17.1% adjusted), and Water Infrastructure margin recovery (17.5% operating / 22.1% adjusted), partially offset by Measurement margin pressure.
growth_explanation.source: 10-K FY2025 segment operating income table; revenue $9,035M (+5.5% YoY); adjusted EBITDA $2,009M (22.2% margin)

falsifiers.observation: U.S. municipal water capex budgets decline two consecutive years
falsifiers.action: Cut growth years 1–5 toward bear 1%; cap exit multiple at 16×

falsifiers.observation: Measurement and Control Solutions operating margin falls below 10% for two years
falsifiers.action: Downgrade moat to eroding; move base toward bear

falsifiers.observation: Restructuring and realignment costs exceed $150M annually without margin lift
falsifiers.action: Trim FCF growth 1–2 pp; cap stance at watch

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
